# Daily Report — 2026-05-02

## Task Completed
Implemented `create_asset_contract` and `update_asset_contract` tools for the
`alm_contract` table (Contract Management application).

- `CreateAssetContractParams` — requires `short_description`; optional vendor,
  start_date, end_date, value, currency, contract_type, category, state,
  assigned_to, department, company, location fields.
- `create_asset_contract` — POST to `/api/now/table/alm_contract`; omits None
  fields from the request body; returns `sys_id` and normalised `contract` dict.
- `UpdateAssetContractParams` — requires `sys_id`; all content fields optional.
- `update_asset_contract` — PATCH to `/api/now/table/alm_contract/{sys_id}`;
  guards against empty-body updates; handles 404 explicitly.
- Both tools registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, and
  `tool_packages.yaml` (`system_administrator` and `full` packages).

Also resolved two earlier queue items:
- Added `list_assets`, `get_asset`, `create_asset` to the `service_desk`
  package in `tool_packages.yaml` (item 1 from queue).
- CI class filter (`ci_class` param on `list_cis`) was already implemented in
  the 2026-04-26 CMDB tools work; marked as resolved (item 2 from queue).
